YUWANCARD-PIG_PIG.title: Pig Pig
YUWANCARD-PIG_PIG.pages.INITIAL.descript: A pig appears before you. It seems to want to give you something...
Choose one card from 5 Pig cards.
Choose one relic from 3 random relics.
YUWANCARD-PIG_PIG.talk.firstVisitEver.0-: Oink oink... Stranger, you have entered my domain.
I am Pig Pig, guardian of this land. Let me see what I can do for you...
YUWANCARD-PIG_PIG.talk.IRONCLAD.0-0.anci: Oink, warrior... Your sword is stained with blood.
YUWANCARD-PIG_PIG.talk.IRONCLAD.0-1.anci: But I know it's to protect those dear to you. Let me help you.
YUWANCARD-PIG_PIG.talk.IRONCLAD.1-0.anci: We meet again, warrior. Your power seems to have grown.
YUWANCARD-PIG_PIG.talk.IRONCLAD.1-1.anci: Continue forward, I will be watching over you.
YUWANCARD-PIG_PIG.talk.IRONCLAD.2-1.anci: Let me give you some more help, I hope you can go further.
YUWANCARD-PIG_PIG.talk.SILENT.0-0.ancien: Oink, hunter... You are always so quiet.
YUWANCARD-PIG_PIG.talk.SILENT.0-1.ancien: But your blades never show mercy. Let me see what I can give you.
YUWANCARD-PIG_PIG.talk.SILENT.1-0.ancien: We meet again, hunter. Silence is your weapon.
YUWANCARD-PIG_PIG.talk.SILENT.1-1.ancien: But sometimes, accepting help is also a form of wisdom.
YUWANCARD-PIG_PIG.talk.SILENT.2-0.ancien: Hunter, your figure is like a ghost.
YUWANCARD-PIG_PIG.talk.SILENT.2-1.ancien: Let me provide you with something useful.
YUWANCARD-PIG_PIG.talk.DEFECT.0-0.ancien: Oink, robot... Your existence intrigues me.
YUWANCARD-PIG_PIG.talk.DEFECT.0-1.ancien: Without a soul, why do you climb the spire? Let me give you something.
YUWANCARD-PIG_PIG.talk.DEFECT.1-0.ancien: We meet again, robot. You seem to be searching for something.
YUWANCARD-PIG_PIG.talk.DEFECT.1-1.ancien: Perhaps the answer lies ahead, continue your journey.
YUWANCARD-PIG_PIG.talk.DEFECT.2-0.ancien: Robot, your logic is always so perfect.
YUWANCARD-PIG_PIG.talk.DEFECT.2-1.ancien: But sometimes, intuition is more important than calculation. Take this.
YUWANCARD-PIG_PIG.talk.REGENT.0-0.ancien: Oink, noble... Your aura is different from others.
YUWANCARD-PIG_PIG.talk.REGENT.0-1.ancien: Noble bloodline doesn't guarantee safety, let me help you.
YUWANCARD-PIG_PIG.talk.REGENT.1-0.ancien: We meet again, noble. Your elegance is impressive.
YUWANCARD-PIG_PIG.talk.REGENT.1-1.ancien: But true power comes from within, not from without.
YUWANCARD-PIG_PIG.talk.REGENT.2-0.ancien: Noble, your determination commands my respect.
YUWANCARD-PIG_PIG.talk.REGENT.2-1.ancien: Let me provide you with some help, continue your journey.
YUWANCARD-PIG_PIG.talk.NECROBINDER.0-0.a: Oink, necromancer... The power of death flows through you.
YUWANCARD-PIG_PIG.talk.NECROBINDER.0-1.a: But life and death are equally precious, let me give you something.
YUWANCARD-PIG_PIG.talk.NECROBINDER.1-0.a: We meet again, necromancer. Your pact with death runs deep.
YUWANCARD-PIG_PIG.talk.NECROBINDER.1-1.a: But sometimes, living requires more courage than dying.
YUWANCARD-PIG_PIG.talk.NECROBINDER.2-1.a: Let me give you some help, may you find balance between life and death.
YUWANCARD-PIG_PIG.talk.ANY.3-1r.ancient: You remind me of a friend from long ago.
YUWANCARD-PIG_PIG.talk.ANY.4-0r.ancient: Danger lurks everywhere in the spire...
YUWANCARD-PIG_PIG.talk.ANY.4-1r.ancient: But you have the strength to overcome it.
YUWANCARD-PIG_PIG.talk.ANY.6-1r.ancient: You seem to have grown stronger.
YUWANCARD-PIG_PIG.talk.ANY.7-1r.ancient: Let me give you something useful.
YUWANCARD-PIG_PIG.talk.ANY.9-1r.ancient: I sense the scent of success.
